title: phase_executor routing table
description: Declarative seat table as data. Each seat has a primary target and a fallback chain; each target carries a model id + a lane object. Concurrency is per-pool. Invariants (never-Haiku, cross-model author) are project-supplied forbidden_combinations rows. The engine is policy-free; projects own their tables.

pools.description: pool name -> concurrency limit. A lane names its pool; lanes sharing a quota share a pool.

forbidden_combinations.description: Project-owned invariant rows. A row matches a target when every present match-field matches; a matched target is rejected with the row's reason. `rule` names a relational invariant the engine evaluates in code (e.g. cross_model_author).

model_pattern.description: Substring matched against a target model id (case-insensitive), e.g. 'haiku'.

provenance.description: Optional evidence/authorship stamp for the seat table (e.g. the benchmark that decided the seats). Free-form object or string; the engine does not interpret it.

policy.description: Project-declared enforcement policy (#464). Optional at the schema level (programmatic legacy tables may omit it); the shipped table declares it. enforced_roles names the roles the loader treats as enforced — the engine evaluator registry (enforce.ENFORCEABLE_ROLES) is the ceiling; projects may narrow, never widen.

manifest.description: Per-seat capability manifest (#464). Declarative governance for the seat's dispatch; W2 (#465) gives the declaration operational meaning. session_policy is EXPLICIT (never defaulted); resume is legal only with an opt-in reason.

confinement.description: Per-provider confinement declaration; keys are provider names and must cover every provider in the seat's primary+chain lanes (loader semantic pass).

max_budget_usd.description: #465: enforceable dollar cap for mutating CLAUDE launches (--max-budget-usd). Optional; REQUIRED by profile_from_manifest before a mutating claude profile can derive. Positive by schema so a zero/negative bound can never masquerade as a cap.

credential_ref.description: Names a config dir / env key (rawgentic: e.g. CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR value). Never a secret value.

pool.description: Concurrency pool key; must exist in top-level `pools`.

chain.description: Fallback targets in order. Engine skips chain-ineligible entries (chain-aware skip), never blind next-entry.

floor.description: Optional quality floor for this seat.

role.description: Optional enforcement role, e.g. review | build. Routing enforcement (enforce.check_pre) keys its per-role requirements (review => author_provider required; build => gate required) on THIS field, not the seat's name — so a renamed seat still enforces and the vocabulary is portable. A seat with no role carries no review/build requirement; an empty-string role is schema-illegal (minLength 1).
